---
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

This page is generated from my bibliography file and grouped by publication type.
My name is highlighted throughout the author lists.
Expand the abstract dropdown beneath each entry to read the abstract when available.

<div id="publications-list" data-bibliography="files/My%20Publications.json">
  <p class="publication-status">Loading publications…</p>
</div>

## Published & in-press articles {#articles}

<div id="publications-articles"></div>

## Preprints {#preprints}

<div id="publications-preprints"></div>

## Theses {#theses}

<div id="publications-theses"></div>

## Posters {#posters}

<div id="publications-posters"></div>

<script src="format/publications.js"></script>

<noscript>
  <p class="publication-error">Enable JavaScript to view the publications list.</p>
</noscript>
